findings.evidence: `rg -n "map_le_iff|map_mono" code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Subcomodule.lean` shows both needed declarations in the base file, while `Comap.lean` has no uses of `⊔`, `sSup`, `iSup`, or finite-join API from `Subcomodule/Lattice.lean`.
findings.fix: Replace the import with `import TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Subcomodule`; `map_le_iff` and `map_mono` are defined in the base file at `Subcomodule.lean:255` and `Subcomodule.lean:266`.
findings.issue: `Comap.lean` imports `TauCeti.Algebra.Coalgebra.Subcomodule.Lattice`, pulling in join/supremum infrastructure that this file does not use.

summary: The new subcomodule inverse-image API is in a natural `Subcomodule/Comap.lean` file, but it imports the lattice file even though it only needs the base subcomodule/map API plus the Mathlib exactness/flatness modules.
